known_findings.title: Literal newline characters showing in UI
known_findings.description: UI may be displaying escaped newline text instead of readable line breaks.
known_findings.suggested_fix: Add or use a clean_display_text helper before inserting text into widgets.

known_findings.title: Literal newline characters showing in UI
known_findings.description: UI may be displaying escaped newline text instead of readable line breaks.
known_findings.suggested_fix: Add or use a clean_display_text helper before inserting text into widgets.

known_findings.title: WMIC usage without enough fallback protection
known_findings.description: WMIC can fail on newer Windows builds. Collector should use CIM/Get-Disk/Get-PhysicalDisk fallback.
known_findings.suggested_fix: Keep WMIC as one attempt only, then fall back to CIM/Get-Disk/Get-PhysicalDisk and mark failed commands in findings.

known_findings.title: Potential fix action without confirmation
known_findings.description: Any self-modifying or file-changing action needs backup, test, confirmation, and rollback.
known_findings.suggested_fix: Require preview/approval before applying patches and create backup before writes.
